positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a crescent moon cradling a stylized, glowing cluster of stars and geometric constellations. The design should feature clean, thick lines and negative space contrast, rendered in a deep indigo and cosmic sapphire palette with highlights of brilliant gold foil effect. The composition is perfectly centered, designed to be easily printable and highly visible on clothing. Style: Retro-modern celestial art, clean vector graphic, high contrast, sticker aesthetic. View: Front view, isolated on white or transparent background.
